name: cos-bot
description: Wires a Telegram bot to Claude Code and installs Chief-of-Staff recipes. The headline path is /cos-bot:start — inspects state and chains the right next step (setup OR connect → install-recipes with defaults → demo). /cos-bot:setup creates a new bot from scratch; /cos-bot:connect is the fast path for an existing token; /cos-bot:install-recipes drops personalized command files into your project (and owns persona writes via `persona [preset|tune|show|reset]`); /cos-bot:demo fires one recipe through Telegram to prove the loop end-to-end. Ships a chief-of-staff sub-agent that recipes inherit.
